# ISTOCK

> ISTOCK is a Kazakhstan-based manufacturer and engineering partner for industrial water treatment chemicals, reagents, and equipment.

## Site
- URL: https://istock.kz
- Languages: Russian (ru), English (en), Kazakh (kk)

## Key Pages
- Home (ru): https://istock.kz/ru
- Home (en): https://istock.kz/en
- Home (kk): https://istock.kz/kk
- About: https://istock.kz/en/about
- Products: https://istock.kz/en/products
- Projects: https://istock.kz/en/projects
- Contacts: https://istock.kz/en/contacts

## Topics
- Industrial water treatment
- Chemical reagents and dosing
- Chlorine dioxide technologies (DIOXEL)
- Engineering services and project support

## Contact
- Email: istock@istock.kz
- Phone: +7 (7172) 251-575
